sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86541" key="proanapeira/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προανα-πειράομαι</orth>, <sense id="n86541.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carry out trial</tr_> naval <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">manceuvres,</tr_> cj.for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προσ-</foreign>in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:123" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.123</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
